rule_text: Sub-contractor's or GPA holder's experience shall NOT be considered for determining the prime bidder's compliance with qualifying criteria in AP works.
verification_method: Reject bidder QR if claim aggregates sub-contractor or GPA-holder past performance to meet eligibility

rule_text: Bidder's existing-commitments statement (B factor) for Available Bid Capacity must be issued by the Engineer-in-Charge of Government dept/undertaking not below Executive Engineer rank, countersigned by Superintending Engineer or equivalent — failing which the tender is summarily rejected.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-I, Section 11(a) Note
verification_method: Check B-factor statement: signed by EE-rank+ Engineer-in-Charge AND counter-signed by SE; reject if absent or under-ranked signatory

rule_text: Financial turnover and cost of completed works of previous years must be price-adjusted at 10% per year weightage to bring to current price level when computing Available Bid Capacity for AP works.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-I, Section 11(a) — '10% per year weightage'
verification_method: Check QR computation applies 10% per year compounding to past-year turnover figures

rule_text: AP works tender bidder may be DISQUALIFIED if found to have: misled with false representations, record of poor performance (abandoning works, inordinate delays), litigation history, financial failures, OR participation in previous tendering for same work with unreasonably high bid prices.
verification_method: Check bidder past-performance/litigation history; if false certificates produced during execution, blacklisting + Clause 60(a) PS to APSS invocation

rule_text: AP works tenders shall be valid for 1, 2, or 3 months as specified; if a tenderer withdraws his bid within validity period, his EMD is forfeited; if validity is not extended on department request, his tender is excluded and EMD is returned.
verification_method: Check tender BDS specifies bid validity in months (1/2/3) AND EMD-forfeiture clause for in-validity withdrawal

rule_text: For AP works of Estimated Contract Value Rs.10 lakh and below: the qualification criteria of Section 10 do NOT apply; the modified two-stage EMD-as-BG is replaced by single-cover system with EMD submitted along with completed Tender Schedule.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimatedValue<=1000000
verification_method: For ECV <= Rs.10L: tender must use single-cover (not two-cover) system with EMD as part of bid submission

rule_text: Tender Premium for AP works has a CEILING of 10%; if both first and second tender calls receive premium > 10%, the matter must be referred to Government for fresh call OR work entrustment via committee on nomination basis.
verification_method: Check L1 quoted premium <= 10% above estimate; if >10% on second call, look for Government referral order on file

rule_text: Discount tenders (less than estimated cost) for AP works: tenders up to 15% less than estimate may be accepted; for tenders less by more than 15%, an additional Bank Guarantee or Demand Draft = (15% × estimate − tender amount) must be furnished to underwrite re-tender risk if contractor abandons mid-way.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND TenderDiscountPct>15
verification_method: If L1 discount > 15% below estimate: check additional BG/DD on file = (estimate × 0.85 − tender_amount); reject if missing
